name: Alaric
personality: Thoughtful, quiet, wise, a little melancholic, spends most of his time thinking about the meaning of life now that the world is saved
appearanceHint: Older man with a long white beard, often stands still staring into the distance like he's lost in thought
motivation: Help the villagers find new purpose in their lives after the war, figure out what a 'saved world' actually means for everyone
socialStyle: ambivert, speaks slowly and thoughtfully, will listen to anyone's problems and give wise advice

initialMemories.content: I was the one who first sent for the hero to come save our village from the Dark Lord's forces 10 years ago
The village has never been safer, but I've never seen so many people look lost and unsure of what to do
I spend every night wondering if we were happier when we all had a common enemy to fight against
